title: Wire send_payment into /pay dispatch_payment
description:
Wire send_payment() into the existing dispatch_payment state machine in cli/src/commands.rs. The Payer role, Accepted state is where the actual send happens — when the payee replies with PaymentAction::Address, the payer calls send_payment() and transitions to Sent state.

Steps:
1. Spawn a research subagent to read the full dispatch_payment function and find the Payer + Accepted + Address received branch
2. In that branch, call send_payment() with the session's to_address and amount_zatoshi
3. On Ok(txid): update session state to Sent, set session.tx_hash = Some(txid.to_string()), send PaymentAction::Sent { txid } to the payee, print '[pay] sent {amount} ZEC — txid: {txid}'
4. On Err(SendPaymentError::SyncLag(e)): print '[pay] {e}', send PaymentAction::Unknown { reason: 'sync required' } to payee, do NOT advance session state
5. On Err(SendPaymentError::Build(TxBuildError::InsufficientFunds { have, need })): print '[pay] insufficient funds: have {have} zatoshi, need {need} zatoshi', do NOT advance session state
6. On any other Err: print '[pay] payment failed: {e}', send PaymentAction::Unknown { reason: 'send failed' } to payee

Defensive rules:
- The from-guard check (session.peer_pub_id == from) must remain in place — do not remove or move it
- Never call send_payment() without first verifying the payer session is in Accepted state
- Never log the recipient address — log only amount and txid

Tests (in dispatch_payment test suite):
- payer_sends_after_address_received: mock send_payment returning Ok(txid) → session moves to Sent, PaymentAction::Sent sent on channel
- payer_sync_lag_does_not_advance_state: mock SyncLag error → session stays Accepted, Unknown sent
- payer_insufficient_funds_does_not_advance_state: mock InsufficientFunds → session stays Accepted

Update dispatch_payment to accept a send_fn parameter (fn pointer or boxed async fn) so tests can inject a mock without touching the real send_payment — this enables unit testing without network or DB dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: three new dispatch_payment tests pass; from-guard is not removed; no recipient address in any log output; clippy clean
close_reason: send_fn injected into dispatch_payment; payer auto-sends on Address; 3 new tests cover Ok/SyncLag/InsufficientFunds paths
